cf_parsed.subtask_body:
I systematically explored Steiner trees connecting Port, Pine, and Rock.
The best candidate found so far is Candidate 2: Port-Mill (9), Mill-Pine (25), Port-Rock (22).
Villages: Port, Mill, Pine, Rock.
Interferences: None.
Frequencies: Port=1, Mill=1, Pine=1, Rock=1 (1 frequency).
Cost: (9+25+22) + 15*1 = 56 + 15 = 71.
Another strong candidate is Candidate 13: Port-Rock (22), Rock-Cape (17), Cape-Pine (8).
Villages: Port, Rock, Cape, Pine.
Interferences: Cape/Pine.
Frequencies: Port=1, Rock=1, Cape=2, Pine=1 (2 frequencies).
Cost: (22+17+8) + 15*2 = 47 + 30 = 77.
Candidate 8: Port-Dune (7), Dune-Rock (20), Rock-Cape (17), Cape-Pine (8).
Villages: Port, Dune, Rock, Cape, Pine.
Interferences: Port/Dune, Cape/Pine.
Frequencies: Port=1, Dune=2, Rock=1, Cape=2, Pine=1 (2 frequencies).
Cost: (7+20+17+8) + 15*2 = 52 + 30 = 82.
Candidate 26: Port-Rock (22), Rock-Cliff (25), Cliff-Pine (9).
Villages: Port, Rock, Cliff, Pine.
Interferences: Port/Cliff, Cliff/Pine.
Frequencies: Port=1, Rock=1, Cliff=2, Pine=1 (2 frequencies).
Cost: (22+25+9) + 15*2 = 56 + 30 = 86.
Candidate 2 is the best so far with a cost of 71.
cf_parsed.updated_plan_state: Systematic exploration of Steiner trees is complete. Candidate 2 (cost 71) is the current best. I will now double-check the interference rules and the tree structure for Candidate 2 to ensure validity.

transcript.content:
PLAN_STATE: Identify the Steiner tree with the lowest combined edge and frequency cost.
The baseline cost is 84.
I have already found a candidate with cost 71: Port-Mill(9), Mill-Pine(25), Port-Rock(22) with 1 frequency.
I have also found a candidate with cost 77: Port-Rock(22), Rock-Cape(17), Cape-Pine(8) with 2 frequencies.
I will now systematically check for even lower costs by exploring other Steiner trees, particularly those that might use only 1 frequency or very cheap edges.
I will also double-check the interference rules for each candidate.
NEXT_SUB: {"id": 1, "desc": "Systematically explore Steiner trees and calculate their total costs (edge + 15*freq)", "p_solve": 0.95, "time_budget_s": 600}
